summary: This is a brief announcement post where Joel Spolsky shares two pieces of news: his book 'Joel on Software' was named one of Amazon's ten best books of 2004 in the Computers and Internet category, and he announces upcoming speaking engagements at two California conferences in March 2005.
key_points: Joel on Software book was recognized as a top-10 Amazon book of 2004 in Computers and Internet
Joel announced speaking appearances at O'Reilly Emerging Technology Conference and SD West 2005
money_quotes: If you're looking for an interesting conference to get your boss to send you to, both would be excellent choices.
key_insight: A short promotional update highlighting the commercial success of Joel's writing and his growing influence as a speaker in the software industry.
